content:
hihi i was looking at the term base and there seems to be a few inconsistencies as to how 信徒 is translated for EN
- the general 信徒 is translated as "believer"
- 原初信徒 is "primordial devoutee" (which seems to be a misspelling of devotee? since dictionaries don't recognize devoutee)

the rest vary between believer and devotee, but some mentions of 信徒 in the story is translated as "follower"
so i was just wondering which to use for general contexts in the story
oh and 女性教徒 is "female cultist" while 男性教徒 is "male disciple" (but these may be different contexts? im not sure)
We will fix this bug with the next hotfix! Sorry for the confusion.
Hi guys! I wanted to share a preview of a web based tool we're cooking up;
It lets you copy & paste the skill texts to preview your translation in game before the translation is uploaded;
currently the codes only run on our local PC. I am working on a way to possibly share it with all volunteers & make it support English interface.
This is just revolutionary!!
Is there a reason why the additional healing from Doll's 3 cost is missing in the battle desc? <:jenkin_processing:1408324289115062333>
the heal boost is baked into the displayed heal number
whether or not the card description should mention it anyway is a different matter but iirc that was the dev response the last time that issue was mentioned
I see, thank you! That's a little confusing imho
I feel like I wouldn't have been confused if the card was showing the total Shield too

Good evening, everyone!
I have a question - Is Salvador’s story proofread?
it's fully human localized at this point so no translation/editing needed, but if you spot any grammar/spelling errors, everything is up for fixing QA-wise

I wanted to ask a single question.
After the animated cutscene, the very first sentence is the following: “The Lightbearer hath prepared a fire to purge this world of all iniquity.” — Why is only hath (“has”) written in the archaic version of the relatively Early Modern English period of time, while the rest of the sentence is written in Late Modern/Contemporary English?
I have started playing his story and this thought just crossed my mind.

Also, “all” can be removed altogether since iniquity itself is most of the times used as an uncountable noun and in this specific context it talks about sin as an entire concept, not a particular example.
that one is, fascinatingly enough, directly from the chinese source
it's probably to imply that it's "old timey" without being unreadable
the general rule is that we do American English

Yeah, but unfortunately, it can end up coming off as a tacky piece of writing, y’know? I pointed out the case of “hath” being used because you either write the full sentence in Middle English (or at least some chunks of it) or you just don’t.

I didn’t want to sound mean or arrogant by any means with my question, and I apologize in advance if I did, but it’s simply a matter of nuance.
well first not sure why you needed to cushion a simple question as if we're gonna jump you lol
but sure I can see where you're coming from
if you feel like it's an issue feel free to bring it up to ace

I’m going to go through the full story and if I eventually come across some issues that I feel they’d need some revising, then sure! I wouldn’t want to bother Ace just for this hath situation.
Thank you very much. 🤗

but the main issue with EN is that we're not in the loop for what the official staff translators are doing, so the risk of overlap is with them and not usually with other volunteers
That's even worse..

ace did provide a list of stories and their status a couple months ago and mentioned they plan to do a new sidestory every patch, but she hasn't really been updating it or keeping us in the loop so it's a bit up in the air as to whether or not it's being actively worked on right now

anyway i'm not pinning the blame on her (she has a lot on her plate to take care of), it's just that i'd always recommend checking in with her just to confirm since we don't really have a concrete answer right now
Is Ace the only person who can update you with official staff progress?

If you want to help with the French translation Corn, you're very welcome. We have... basically everything to do and we are like... two lol. So any help is appreciated. We started translating the Awakeners skills recently, so if you like 24 you could translate hers <:murphy_cake:1408324295180030002>
she's mentioned that she might be able to get the operations team (kada and lyra) to help with it since right now she doesn't really have the time available to manage us as much as she'd like
but as of right now yes
Then it would be even much better to organize things properly. While Mercy's repository is good for contributions, it's not convenient to check progress through it.

You can make sheets like we did:
1. Welcome sheet with some important information/links.
2. Progression sheet, so everyone can see what is being done, what needs to be proofread and what was not touched at all. This sheet needs to be shared with someone, who can frequently (once a week, for example) update with official staff work.
3. Stylization guidelines can be moved here, so people won't need to open another tab in their browser.
4. Important terminology sheet, so everyone can quickly check with UpToDate important things.

I have followed all the instructions in your <#1419429157779280035> channel and please let me know if I need to do something else. I have just downloaded the file and for the time being, I will create a Google Docs document where I put everything AI-translated in one column then my version in the other column, just for a better visualization of the written material and the progress I make further on, before transferring every line with line in the sheet.
grr why is Corposant's last text message formatted like they're talking when it's a text message

<@1031618460414918686> Here's the situation:
Ace & Mia have been doing a fantastic job so far going through and translating the story content of the game, but it's unfortunately very difficult to determine what exactly they're working on at any point in time.

My Repo is designed to help volunteers not "step on each others' toes" by documenting which volunteers are working on what content, but since Ace & Mia don't use that system, they expect *us* to tell *them* what we want to work on, and they avoid stepping on *our* toes. My Repo's Ledgers also do not track most of their progress on content, nor do they track any progress made by volunteers outside of its system.

From what I'm aware:
Salvador's story (The Color of Blood) was **proofread** by someone early on in the first wave of volunteers, and I'm unaware of it being touched on since then.
Tulu's story (Coronation Day) has not been touched and is still MTL. Many volunteers have... Let's say *debated* about the translation status of his *profile story* but the actual Psyche Deepdive hasn't been worked on afaik.

24's story (Serene Fission) has also not been touched and is still MTL; I raised my hand before I became far too busy with everything else, as I found 24's character and story to be very compelling, and I was close friends with a system before I lost them and so being fairly familiar with the terminology and what's considered tasteful or offensive with representing DID is something I'd like to have a hand in. That being said, my name's not on the Ledger for that file because I simply don't have time to do it, but since you're interested I would love to engage and give my opinions while you work on it!

I also am just one guy that spends way more time here than he has to spare, which is still not quite enough to keep up with my Repo at the moment, so I need to either scale back, optimize further, and/or find help with the project... all of which require time to be spent <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
So currently the Repo has not been updated with the most recent source text, and I'm going to wait until the *next* batch of source to update it
but I can update specifically Serene Fission's file real quick to make sure it's all current for ya

That's amazing then, friend, and I will surely let you know when I have some concrete progress made so we can talk some more about it. ❤️ That's probably why I also thought a Google Docs document  would be an amazing idea and I will offer you access to it so you can also edit and leave comments. I love the portrayal of Bipolarity, BPD, and DID in any media and I am happy to see someone who shares my enthusiasm.
